data.title: Hyperliquid launches WCT/USDC perpetual contract, supporting up to 3x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hyperliquid announced that it has launched the WCT/USDC perpetual contract, supporting up to 3x leverage trading.

data.title: The ZKsync attacker has transferred about 1.7 million ZK tokens across the chain, and it is suspected that he has started cashing out.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Cyvers Alerts monitoring, the ZKsync attacker accessed about $5 million of unclaimed ZK tokens. Currently, about 1.7 million ZKs have been transferred across chains to Ethereum, and together with 10 ETH, they have been transferred to HitBTC related addresses, and it is suspected that cash-out operations have begun.

data.title: Bitcoin trader doubts breakout 'significance' as BTC price nears $87K
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) eyed new April highs at the April 15 Wall Street open amid skepticism over BTC price strength. BTC/USD 1-hour chart. Continued strength through the weekend had set up the pair for an attack on levels closer to $90,000, these absent since early March
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-trader-doubts-breakout-signal-btc-price-nears-87-k?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Here’s how the US plans to grow its Bitcoin reserve in budget-neutral manner
data.description:
Bo Hines, Executive Director of the Presidential Council of Advisers on Digital Assets, has outlined how he claims the US plans to grow its newly established Strategic Bitcoin Reserve (SBR) budget-neutrally. On Anthony Pompliano’s podcast, Hines explained that the administration is exploring several budget-neutral strategies, including leveraging tariff revenue and revaluing Treasury gold certificates.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/heres-how-the-us-plans-to-grow-its-bitcoin-reserve-in-budget-neutral-manner/

data.title: Standard Chartered: Stablecoin market size may increase to US$2 trillion by the end of 2028
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Standard Chartered Bank said that the passage of the US Stablecoin Act may lead to a significant increase in the supply of stablecoins. It is expected that by the end of 2028, the size of the stablecoin market may grow from the current US$230 billion to US$2 trillion. In addition, Standard Chartered also stated that the increase in the supply of stablecoins has an impact on US Treasury purchases and US dollar hegemony. 
In addition, Standard Chartered Bank believes that the increase in demand for stablecoin reserves denominated in US dollars will lead to additional demand for the US dollar, which can then support US dollar hegemony. It is expected that the stablecoin industry will turn to the model adopted by USDC issuer Circle. (The Block)

data.title: A whale withdrew 3,704 BTC from CEX today, worth $315 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, whales have begun to accumulate BTC. A whale withdrew a total of approximately 3,704 BTC from Binance and Kraken today, with a value of US$315 million.

data.title: Abu Dhabi regulator fines crypto firm Hayvn $12.45 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cryptocurrency company Hayvn was fined $12.45 million by Abu Dhabi regulators for anti-money laundering control issues. Investigators from the Abu Dhabi Financial Services Regulatory Authority said Hayvn has been processing customer transactions through an unlicensed special purpose company AC Holding, and AC Holding provided more than 200 forged documents to banking partners. (Decrypt)

data.title: Bithumb temporarily suspends ZK trading and deposits and withdrawals
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Bithumb stated that it had discovered security issues with ZK. As a result, the price volatility of ZK tokens has intensified, and deposit and withdrawal services will be temporarily suspended until market stability is ensured.

data.title: BlackRock increased its holdings by approximately 431 BTC, worth $37.07 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Arkham monitoring data showed that about 15 minutes ago, BlackRock increased its holdings of 431.823 BTC through its Bitcoin exchange-traded fund IBIT, worth US$37.07 million.

data.title: EU Anticipates Continued U.S. Tariff Policy Amid Stalled Negotiations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market reports indicate that the European Union expects the United States to maintain its current tariff policy due to limited progress in negotiations. The ongoing discussions have not yielded significant advancements, leading to the anticipation that U.S. President Donald Trump's administration will continue with the existing trade measures.
